name: Frozen Land
overview: Taxi driver Larisa Aidarova from a small seaside town is preparing for the wedding with her beloved Maksim, with whom she has been working and living together for more than a year. But all plans collapse when Maksim is detained on suspicion of murder.

trailers.title: Трейлер «Мёрзлая земля», Светлана Ходченкова, Антон Филипенко, Юрий Чурсин (2023), Wink Originals
